nasb.text: Although he was grieved, the king commanded it to be given because of his oaths, and because of his dinner guests.

esv.text: And the king was sorry, but because of his oaths and his guests he commanded it to be given.

cnv.text: 王就憂愁，但因為誓言和在座的賓客，就下令給她。

ccb.text: 希律感到为难，但既然在众宾客面前起了誓，只好下令给她。

csbs.text: 王就忧忧愁愁，但因所起的誓，又因一同坐席的人，就下令给她。
